# Derk Pereboom

*1957 – ? · American*

Contemporary American philosopher, the leading defender of hard [incompatibilism](../glossary/free-will.md): no one basically deserves blame or punishment, yet we may protect and reform on a "quarantine" model, without invoking desert.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
